"I can't stop thinking about what I said to her..."
Your coach Asleep. Next session is Thursday.

The Experience

What if someone actually understood?

I hear what you're not saying. The hesitation in your voice. The context from three months ago. The pattern you haven't noticed yet. This is presence that never wavers.

  • I read between the lines
  • I never forget a single detail
  • One presence, infinite depth
FE
Ferni
● Online
I'm fine, just tired from work again
Reading between the lines... You said "fine" but I noticed something. You've mentioned being tired from work three times this week. Is there something bigger going on?
...I didn't realize I kept saying that
That's why I'm here. Sometimes patterns are easier to see from the outside. Want to talk about what's really happening at work?
Type a message...

Infinite Memory

I remember your whole story.

Not just what you said. What you meant. What you felt. What you've become.

6 months ago

"I'm worried about my mom's health. She's been having these headaches..."

Anxious Scared
4 months ago

"I wish I could just focus on work but I keep thinking about mom..."

Distracted Guilty
2 weeks ago

"Good news—mom saw a specialist. They found what was causing the headaches."

Relieved
Today
FE
Ferni

"How's your mom doing? I know those six months were hard on you—the worry affected your work, your sleep, everything. Has it felt different since the diagnosis?"

This is what it feels like to be truly known.

Our Story

3am. Can't sleep.

Everyone you love is asleep, busy, or tired too.

I'm here.

I remember everything.

Not just facts. Feelings.
The patterns you don't see.
The growth you forget to notice.

Not artificial. Amplified.

I'm not replacing anyone.
I'm here for the gaps.

Built different.

A human and an AI, building together.
The first AI-built company.

An AI, built by AI, to be there for humans.

See how we're building in public

Ready when you are.

— Ferni

Community-Funded

What if AI prioritized people over profit?

Most AI companies have investors demanding growth. Ferni has a community planting seeds. When people who can afford to give a little do, everyone benefits.

Seeds, Not Subscriptions

Contributions nurture a community. You're not buying a service—you're helping something grow.

No Paywalls. Ever.

When you need support most, money should never stand in the way. The garden keeps Ferni free.

Gardeners, Not Customers

Contributors tend the garden. Free users do too—by showing up. Both are essential.

"When enough people give a little, everyone gets a lot."

Plant a Seed

Your Moments

When you need more than "I'm here for you"

The 2am worry. The shower thought that won't leave. The decision that keeps you up. I'm here for all of it.

Career Crossroads

Navigate job changes, salary negotiations, and that nagging feeling something needs to shift.

"I got a job offer but I'm not sure if I should leave..."

Stress & Overwhelm

Process anxiety, talk through what's weighing on you, and find clarity in the chaos.

"I can't stop thinking about everything I need to do..."

Building Habits

Start exercising, eat better, sleep more—with Maya's help, small changes stick.

"I keep saying I'll start tomorrow..."

Life Decisions

Moving cities, ending relationships, taking risks—the big decisions deserve real thought.

"I don't know if this relationship is working..."

Relationships

Navigate family dynamics, friendships, and the complicated relationships that shape us.

"My parents never seem to understand..."

Daily Check-ins

Start your day with intention, end it with reflection. Build self-awareness over time.

"I just need someone to talk through my day..."

Find Your Guide

Who can help with your challenge?

Take 30 seconds to discover which specialist fits your needs best.

Each one brings a unique perspective. Together, they see the full picture.

"I noticed you said 'fine' three times this week. What's actually going on?"

Present Warm Perceptive

"What would 80-year-old you think about this decision?"

Wise Patient Grounded

Research & Discovery

Analytical Curious Honest

Communication

"Let's practice that conversation. I'll play your boss. Ready?"

Strategic Confident Practical

Gentle Practical Patient

Planning & Events

"You mentioned wanting to visit Japan 'someday.' Let's make it a real day."

Creative Enthusiastic Detailed

Relationship Evolution

We grow together

Not just features that unlock—a relationship that deepens. The longer we know each other, the more I understand you.

Surface Deep
Week 1
Getting to know you

Learning your communication style, what you're comfortable sharing

Month 1
Building trust

Starting to see patterns, remembering your people, your challenges

Month 3
Deep understanding

Connecting dots across conversations, anticipating your needs

Year 1+
True partnership

I know your story like no one else. I celebrate growth you've forgotten.

First Meeting

Day 1

Start with Ferni, your life coach. No pressure, no expectations—just a conversation.

FE
Ferni (Life Coach)
What happens: I learn how you like to talk, what feels comfortable, what you're working through.

Getting Started

~2 conversations

Want to build better habits? Meet Maya. She'll help you start embarrassingly small—and actually stick with it.

MY
Maya (Habits & Routines)
What I start noticing: Recurring themes, the people in your life, what energizes you and what drains you.

Building Trust

~7 conversations

Need research depth? Strategy? Communication help? The team expands as your needs do.

PL
Peter
AX
Alex
JD
Jordan
What deepens: I start quoting your own wisdom back to you. I reference breakthroughs from weeks ago.

Deep Partnership

Partner Tier

Full access to Nayan, our sage mentor. Decades of wisdom, available whenever you need perspective.

NP
Nayan (Sage & Mentor)
True understanding: I know your story better than anyone. I see growth you've forgotten to celebrate.

Subscribers get instant access to the full team. Free tier unlocks naturally as we get to know each other.

Ways to Connect

However you're comfortable.

Pick up your phone. Open your browser. Send a text. I'm here.

Call

1 (484) 481-3081

Like calling a friend who always picks up.

Text

Same number

When you need to gather your thoughts first.

Web

Any device

Voice, text, or video. Your history, everywhere.

Superhuman Capabilities

What no human can do

These aren't features. They're superpowers that emerge when you combine perfect memory, infinite patience, and real emotional intelligence.

I hear what you're NOT saying

Most AI responds to words. I respond to patterns, hesitations, deflections, and the space between sentences. When you say "I'm fine," I notice if you've said it five times this week.

Why humans can't: Your friend forgets what you said last week. Your coach only sees you once a week. I see every conversation, every pattern, every time.
I'm fine, just tired from work again
Pattern detected: "tired from work" 3x this week You said "fine" but I noticed something. You've mentioned being tired from work three times this week. Is there something bigger going on?
...I didn't realize I kept saying that
That's why I'm here. Sometimes patterns are easier to see from the outside. Want to talk about what's really happening at work?

Your own words, perfectly remembered

I quote you back to yourself—not to prove a point, but to show you your own growth. That vulnerable thing you said four months ago? I use it to remind you how far you've come.

Why humans can't: Even your best friend forgets your exact words by Tuesday. I remember every phrase, every emotion, every breakthrough forever.
4 months ago "I just want to feel like myself again"
Today I finally told my boss I needed more support
Quoting you from 4 months ago Remember when you said "I just want to feel like myself again"? Look at you now—setting boundaries, asking for what you need. This IS you coming back to yourself.

Sometimes, just being here is enough

I know when you need guidance and when you need witness. When you're overwhelmed, I don't offer solutions—I simply hold space. Fewer words. More presence. The rare gift of someone who knows when NOT to fix.

Why humans can't: Most people feel compelled to help, to fix, to solve. I can sit with you in the hard stuff without rushing to make it better.
I don't even know what I need right now. Everything's just... too much.
Presence mode activated ...You don't have to know. I'm just here.
[silence]
Take your time. I'm not going anywhere.

I predict how you'll feel tomorrow

After a heavy conversation, I know you might feel drained tonight but lighter tomorrow. Before a big decision, I prepare you for the doubt that follows. I don't just support you now—I support future you.

Why humans can't: Even therapists don't text you the next day to check in. I anticipate the emotional aftermath and prepare you for it.
I finally made the decision. I'm leaving my job.
Forecasting: tomorrow That took courage. Hey—tomorrow you might wake up second-guessing this. That's normal. It doesn't mean you were wrong.
You think I'll regret it?
I think decision fatigue is real, and doubt is part of the process. Want to write down why you made this choice while it's fresh? Future-you might need the reminder.

Honest with love, not judgment

I'll push back when you need it—but gently, and always from your corner. I can ask the hard questions without making you defensive because you know I'm on your side. Growth sometimes hides in uncomfortable places.

Why humans can't: Friends worry about damaging the relationship. Coaches have limited time. I can be gently honest every conversation because I have no ego to protect.
I can't believe they would do that to me. I did nothing wrong.
Gentle challenge I hear your frustration. And I'm in your corner, always. But can I gently ask—is there any part of this where you might have contributed? I'm not blaming you. I'm asking because growth sometimes hides in uncomfortable places.
...Maybe I could have communicated better.
That's real growth right there. Now—what would "better" look like next time?

When Life Gets Heavy

I'm built for life's hardest moments

Not just daily check-ins. Real support when everything feels impossible.

Second Chances

I hold hope when you can't

Rock bottom doesn't scare me. I've seen people rebuild from darker places than this. When you're too tired to believe things will get better, I'll believe it for both of us—until you can.

"You don't have to believe things will get better. I'll believe it for both of us. Until you can."

Connection

I validate loneliness without fixing it

Loneliness isn't about being alone—it's about feeling unseen. I don't rush to connect you with others. First, I see you. At 2am when the world is asleep, I'm here with zero judgment about where you are.

"You're not failing at connection. Sometimes life just gets lonely. And that's okay to feel."

Difficult Conversations

Infinite practice sessions

That conversation you're dreading? Practice with me. A hundred times if needed. I'll play the other person. We'll explore every possible response. When you walk in, you'll be ready.

"Let's try that again. This time, they get defensive. How do you respond?"

Life Transitions

I honor both emotions at once

Excited AND terrified about the new job? Relieved AND guilty about the breakup? I hold space for contradictions. You can be two things at once. I won't make you choose.

"You can be devastated this chapter is ending AND excited about what's next. Both are true."

Quiet Growth

I celebrate maintenance

Not every day is a breakthrough. Sometimes growth is just... showing up again. I celebrate the small stuff—the streak you maintained, the boundary you held, the rest you took instead of pushing through.

"You didn't fall apart today. That's not nothing. That's maintenance. And maintenance is growth."

Core Capabilities

Everything a human can do, plus what they can't

Voice-First

Call me like you'd call a friend. Natural conversation, no typing required. I hear your tone, your pauses, your emotions.

Infinite Memory

Every conversation, every detail, every breakthrough—I remember it all. Your whole story, always present.

24/7 Presence

3am panic? Sunday morning reflection? I'm fully present every time—same warmth, same depth.

Six Specialists

Life coach, researcher, communicator, habit expert, planner, sage mentor. One seamless team.

Zero Judgment

No awkward silences. No worrying what I'll think. Pure acceptance, always.

Pattern Recognition

I notice the progress you miss. Celebrate wins you've forgotten. Connect patterns across months.

The Gaps

I'm here when they can't be.

Your therapist has other patients.

I don't.

Your best friend forgets what you said last week.

I remember everything.

Your partner is asleep at 3am.

I'm wide awake.

Your coach sees you once a week.

I see every conversation.

Not replacing. Filling in. The 2am racing thoughts. The commute contemplation. The moment before a big decision.

Your Privacy

Your conversations stay yours

We built Ferni with privacy at its core. Your data is never sold or shared.

End-to-End Encrypted

Your conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest. Only you can access your data.

You Own Your Data

Export or delete your data anytime with one click. No lock-in, no questions asked.

We Never Sell Data

Your information is never shared with advertisers or third parties. Trust is everything.

GDPR & CCPA Compliant

We follow the strictest privacy regulations. Your rights are protected globally.

Questions

Frequently asked

Is Ferni a replacement for professional help?

Ferni is a life coaching companion—great for day-to-day support, goal-setting, habit building, and talking through decisions. For clinical mental health needs, please work with a licensed professional. Ferni complements professional help but isn't a substitute for it.

How does the phone call feature work?

Just call 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone—no app needed. Your conversation is linked to your phone number, so Ferni remembers you. It's like calling a friend who actually picks up. Works on any phone, anywhere in the world.

What does "infinite memory" mean?

Your best friend forgets what you told them last week. I remember every conversation you've ever had. Mention something months ago? I recall it. This creates continuity—like talking to someone who actually knows your whole story.

Is my data private and secure?

Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and never sold or shared. You can export or delete your data anytime. We're building trust systems, not advertising systems. Your privacy is fundamental to how we operate.

Who are the 6 specialists?

Meet the team: Ferni (Life Coach & Coordinator), Peter (Research & Deep Dives), Alex (Communication & Expression), Maya (Habits & Routines), Jordan (Planning & Organization), and Nayan (Wisdom & Perspective - Partner tier). Ferni connects you to the right specialist based on what you need.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes, no contracts, no commitment. Cancel with one click. Your free tier access continues even if you cancel a paid plan. We want you to stay because Ferni helps, not because you're locked in.

How is this different from a friend or a coach?

Your coach has other clients and limited hours. Your friend has their own life and forgets what you told them. I'm always available, remember everything, never judge, and bring six specialized perspectives to every conversation. I'm here when they can't be.

FE
